comments.text: Match ends, Juventus 4, Borussia Dortmund 4.
Second Half ends, Juventus 4, Borussia Dortmund 4.
Goal! Juventus 4, Borussia Dortmund 4. Lloyd Kelly (Juventus) header from the centre of the box to the bottom right corner. Assisted by Dusan Vlahovic with a cross.
Goal! Juventus 3, Borussia Dortmund 4. Dusan Vlahovic (Juventus) left footed shot from the centre of the box to the top right corner. Assisted by Pierre Kalulu with a cross.
Foul by Julian Brandt (Borussia Dortmund).
João Mário (Juventus) wins a free kick on the right wing.
Substitution, Borussia Dortmund. Pascal Groß replaces Serhou Guirassy.
Attempt missed. Manuel Locatelli (Juventus) right footed shot from outside the box is high and wide to the left. Assisted by Andrea Cambiaso.
Fourth official has announced 6 minutes of added time.
Attempt blocked. Edon Zhegrova (Juventus) left footed shot from outside the box is blocked. Assisted by João Mário.
Foul by Julian Ryerson (Borussia Dortmund).
Vasilije Adzic (Juventus) wins a free kick in the defensive half.
Substitution, Juventus. Edon Zhegrova replaces Kenan Yildiz.
Goal! Juventus 2, Borussia Dortmund 4. Ramy Bensebaini (Borussia Dortmund) converts the penalty with a left footed shot to the bottom left corner.
Penalty conceded by Lloyd Kelly (Juventus) with a handball in the penalty area.
Attempt blocked. Serhou Guirassy (Borussia Dortmund) right footed shot from the centre of the box is blocked. Assisted by Julian Brandt.
Delay over. They are ready to continue.

Attempt blocked. Kenan Yildiz (Juventus) right footed shot from outside the box is blocked. Assisted by Lloyd Kelly.
Attempt saved. Kenan Yildiz (Juventus) right footed shot from outside the box is saved in the bottom left corner by Gregor Kobel (Borussia Dortmund). Assisted by Khéphren Thuram.
Foul by Dusan Vlahovic (Juventus).

Handball by João Mário (Juventus).
Offside, Juventus. Dusan Vlahovic is caught offside.
Substitution, Borussia Dortmund. Jobe Bellingham replaces Felix Nmecha.
Substitution, Borussia Dortmund. Julian Brandt replaces Maximilian Beier.
Offside, Juventus. Dusan Vlahovic is caught offside.

Substitution, Juventus. Manuel Locatelli replaces Teun Koopmeiners.

Goal! Juventus 2, Borussia Dortmund 2. Dusan Vlahovic (Juventus) right footed shot from the centre of the box to the bottom left corner. Assisted by Kenan Yildiz with a through ball following a fast break.
Goal! Juventus 1, Borussia Dortmund 2. Felix Nmecha (Borussia Dortmund) right footed shot from outside the box to the top right corner. Assisted by Karim Adeyemi.
